name: omni-fusion
description: MCP bridge exposing CodeGraph tools to MCP-capable AI agents. Other projects (Understand-Anything, ECC, gstack, Karpathy) integrate via CLAUDE.md slash commands and skill files, not MCP.

codegraph.description: Fast AST knowledge graph: search, context, callers, callees, impact analysis

understand-anything.description: Multi-agent LLM code understanding pipeline (requires Claude Code plugin)

gstack.description: Virtual engineering team workflow (requires gstack skill files)

ecc.description: ECC agent definitions (48 agents for TDD, code review, security, build resolution). Note: `~` expands to user home directory per shell convention, not standard JSON.

gstack.description: gstack skills for virtual engineering team. Note: `~` expands to user home directory per shell convention, not standard JSON.

karpathy.description: 4 behavioral principles: Think, Simple, Surgical, Goal-Driven

code-exploration.description: Run codegraph init -i first, then /understand for LLM enrichment

feature-sprint.description: gstack plans, ECC builds/reviews, gstack ships/retros
